identity.name: AI Code Factory Project
identity.principle: Simple outside. Intelligent inside. Auditable always.

quality_bar.frontend_visual: premium, disciplined, no typographic gigantism, real visual evidence
quality_bar.backend: explicit contracts, validation, error cases, proportional tests

must_not_do: invent phone numbers, emails, addresses, social links
invent metrics, clients, years of experience or legal claims
implement frontend visual work without approved design
close visual work without visual acceptance
